_README: Copy to perf.local.json (which is gitignored) and fill in only what your app needs to reach the measured page. This file holds anything secret or host-specific so it never lands in git or the results doc. Every field is OPTIONAL — delete what you don't use. This demo currently needs NONE of it (no login), so perf.local.json is just {}.

extraHttpHeaders._doc: Sent on every request via emulate(extraHttpHeaders). Use for token auth.

cookies._doc: Set before navigating (e.g. a session cookie).
cookies.name: session

login._doc: If the app needs a form login, the skill fills + submits it before measuring.
